message:
fix(dot-parser): advance past full UTF-8 characters when skipping unknown bytes

The DOT parser's fallback path advanced one byte at a time, which splits
multi-byte UTF-8 sequences (accented characters, emoji, CJK) and leaves
pos on an invalid char boundary, causing panics on subsequent operations.
Now reads the UTF-8 leading byte to determine continuation byte count
and advances past the entire character.

Add tests for multi-byte UTF-8 (cafe/naive with diacritics) and 4-byte
emoji inputs to prevent regression.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
